Short Description: Untrusted input flows into SQL query.
Recommendation: Use prepared statements with bind variables.

Short Description: Shell command constructed with user input.
Recommendation: Use ProcessBuilder with explicit args; validate/escape input.

Short Description: Potential overflow via strcpy on user buffer.
Recommendation: Use strncpy/strlcpy and bounds checking.

Short Description: MD5 used for password hashing.
Recommendation: Switch to bcrypt/Argon2 or at least SHA-256 with salt+pepper.

Short Description: Stack trace leaked in API response.
Recommendation: Return generic error; log details server-side only.

Short Description: Temp file created world-writable.
Recommendation: Use secure temp APIs and restrictive file permissions.

Short Description: ResultSet not closed in error path.
Recommendation: Use try-with-resources for DB objects.

Short Description: Possible null dereference of order.getUser().
Recommendation: Add null checks or use Optional.

Short Description: API key present in config.
Recommendation: Move secrets to vault/ENV; rotate the key.

Short Description: Logging contains partial credentials.
Recommendation: Mask or omit sensitive fields from logs.

Short Description: Unused method never referenced.
Recommendation: Remove unused code to reduce complexity.

Short Description: Repeated list concatenation in loop.
Recommendation: Use StringBuilder or pre-sized collections.

Short Description: Unused assignment ignored by subsequent code.
Recommendation: Remove redundant store or use value.

Short Description: Stream not closed on exception path.
Recommendation: Use try-with-resources or finally to close resource.
